mano_cua.result_summary: 页面正常渲染未崩溃，Console无TypeError。但mano-cua在Console调试中花费过多步骤(105步)，未能充分验证设置starting-date-value=2018-12-01和ending-date-value=2018-12-02后的行为。Set checkIn/checkOut value区域输入框为空，Vue根组件data仅有ptPT属性。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Vue app root data only has ptPT property. Set checkIn/checkOut value sections have empty input fields. No TypeError in console. Ran out of steps investigating Vue component structure.

deploy_notes.workaround: node-sass replaced with dart-sass via npm alias (node-sass@npm:sass)
